titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Hakam
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Hakam

segments: ه عن عليّ بن الحكم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عليّ بن الحكم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عليّ بن الحكم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عليّ بن الحكم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Hakam has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Hakam has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam.
